disposition_decision.rationale: raw 91 C3 honest path: separate infra-side completion (4/4 PASS) from user-side blocker (11 profiles). Total RETIRE would erase real infra progress; total SATISFIED would conceal user-side dependency. SCOPE-NARROW is the truthful split.

raw_71_falsifier_retire_rule_compliance.rule: raw 71 falsifier-retire-rule: a falsifier may not be retired without (a) explicit disposition decision, (b) audit row recording disposition, (c) evidence list, (d) any uncovered residual concern recapitulated as a new falsifier

raw_71_falsifier_retire_rule_compliance.manual_review_marker: raw_71_retire_rule applied; SCOPE-NARROW path slightly relaxes strict reading vs 5/5 PASS; reviewer must validate the infra/user split is honest

F-DISPO-2.claim_summary: F-MANUAL-LOGIN successfully captures the residual responsibility (will fire if 11-profile /login not done by 2026-04-29 24:00)

F-DISPO-3.claim_summary: raw 71 retire-rule was honored (no silent retirement; disposition + audit + evidence + residual all present)
F-DISPO-3.falsified_if: audit log lacks any of the 4 compliance items, or F-CL-JOINT-9 disposition is changed without new audit row
